_description: NUTS 2016 → NUTS 2021 correspondence for changed regions only
_notes: Primary change: all UK codes removed (Brexit 2021-01-01). Poland Mazowieckie split and Ireland/Hungary restructuring happened in NUTS 2013→2016, NOT 2016→2021.

removed_uk._note: All UK NUTS codes removed from NUTS 2021 due to Brexit. 179+ codes across NUTS1/2/3.

other_changes.note: Minor boundary adjustments in some NUTS3 regions, codes unchanged

_verification_note: This table covers NUTS 2016→2021 only. For NUTS 2013→2016 changes (Poland PL12→PL91/PL92, Ireland IE01/IE02→IE04/IE05/IE06, Hungary HU10→HU11/HU12), use a separate NUTS2013→2016 crosswalk.
